title: Replace hardcoded 30-day millisecond calculation with shared THIRTY_DAYS_AGO_MS constant
description: analytics/by-endpoint.ts and analytics/summary.ts each compute new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000) inline, ignoring the THIRTY_DAYS_AGO_MS constant already defined and used in by-date.ts. Replace inline calculations with the shared constant.
